alt_text.slide-01: Navy background with headline 'Verified isn't a label. It's a pipeline.' and a gold ADL VERIFIED stamp.
alt_text.slide-02: Light card reading 'Inside pilot geofence. Velocity checked against prior submissions.' with a GPS pin icon.
alt_text.slide-03: Light card reading 'Captured on-device. Timestamp, device, capture angle. PII stripped, audit trail kept.' with a camera icon.
alt_text.slide-04: Light card reading 'Every point gets a number. Cross-checked against neighbors, agent trust tier, anomaly patterns.' with a star icon.
alt_text.slide-05: Terracotta background reading 'That's ground truth. Mapping Bonamoussadi, Douala — one audited point at a time.' with a DM MAP call to action.

publish_notes: No Meta Graph API creds in repo. Options: (1) paste slides + caption into Later/Buffer with this schedule. (2) wire /api/social/schedule endpoint to Meta Graph API. (3) publish manually at scheduled time.

story_crosspost.frame_1: Slide 1 recut 1080x1920 with 'Swipe the carousel ->' sticker linking to feed post.
story_crosspost.frame_2: Poll: 'Which step surprises you most?' GPS | EXIF | Risk score.
story_crosspost.frame_3: Question: 'What would you map in your neighborhood?'
